message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: openai does not support parameters: mission (#1274)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-13402-bug-openai-does-not-support-parameters-reasoning-effort-for-model-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: openai does not support parameters: ['reasoning_effort'], for model=gpt-5",
+    "description": "[Bug]: openai does not support parameters: ['reasoning_effort'], for model=gpt-5. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### What happened?

Like the title, I can't set reasoning effort to minimal at all."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: openai does not support parameters:…",
+        "description": "## [Bug Fix] - Allow using `reasoning_effort` for gpt-5 model family and `reasoning` for Responses API

## Relevant issues

## Pre-Submission checklist

- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)

## Type

🐛 Bug Fix
✅ Test

## Changes
```yaml
curl --request POST \
  --url http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
  "model": "openai/gpt-5",
  "messages": [
    {
			"role": "system", 
			"content": "You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user'\''s question."
		},
		{
			"role": "user", 
			"content": "which number is bigger? 9.21 or 9.9?"
		}
  ],
	"stream": false,
	"stream_options": {
		"include_usage": true
	},
	
	"reasoning_effort": "high"
}
'
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: openai does not support parameters:… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## [Bug Fix] - Allow using `reasoning_effort` for gpt-5 model family and `reasoning` for Responses API

## Relevant issues

## Pre-Submission checklist

- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)

## Type

🐛 Bug Fix
✅ Test

## Changes",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "curl --request POST \
  --url http://localhost:4000/v1/chat/completions \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
  "model": "openai/gpt-5",
  "messages": [
    {
			"role": "system", 
			"content": "You are a helpful assistant. Answer the user'\''s question."
		},
		{
			"role": "user", 
			"content": "which number is bigger? 9.21 or 9.9?"
		}
  ],
	"stream": false,
	"stream_options": {
		"include_usage": true
	},
	
	"reasoning_effort": "high"
}
'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
